# resend_segment (Resource)

Manages a Resend segment. Name changes force replacement (no update endpoint).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_segment" "example" {
  name = "Active Users"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Segment name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Segment UUID.
